description:
**Context:**
Closed PR #53 because it had too many merge conflicts after 249 commits landed on main. However, there IS duplication worth addressing.

**Clear consolidation targets:**
1. `normalize_br_tags()` - 12 occurrences across 6 files (timeline.rs, sequence.rs, svg/elements.rs, svg/edges.rs, layout/size.rs)
2. `wrap_text_by_width()` - 3 duplicates (kanban.rs, c4.rs, timeline.rs)  
3. `estimate_text_width()` - 2 duplicates (kanban.rs, timeline.rs)

**NOT in scope:**
- Legend rendering abstraction (too many variations)
- Title rendering abstraction (implementations differ)
- ChartMargins struct (files use different margin strategies)

**Approach:**
Use code-simplifier skill on fresh main to identify and extract only the clearly duplicated utilities.
title: Create text_utils.rs for common string utilities
